---
title: ""
format: html
---

```{=html}
<div class="wd-hero content-section">

  <div class="wd-hero-copy">
    <div class="wd-eyebrow">Web Development</div>
    <h1 class="wd-hero-title">
      Websites That<br>
      <span>Work as Hard</span><br>
      as You Do
    </h1>
    <p class="wd-hero-subtitle">
      Fast, accessible, and beautifully functional — I build modern, 
      mobile-first websites for academics, researchers, and businesses 
      that need a digital presence worth remembering.
    </p>
    <div class="wd-hero-actions">
      <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Start a Web Project</a>
      <a href="#services" class="btn-ghost-wd">Explore Services ↓</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="wd-hero-visual">
    <div class="hero-carousel-container">
      
      <div class="hero-carousel" id="heroCarousel">
        
        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="/images/Livesite_1.png" alt="Academic Portfolio" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <h4>Dr. [Name] Portfolio</h4>
              <p>Academic • Quarto</p>
            </div>
            <a href="[https://your-live-link.com](https://your-live-link.com)" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="images/project-2.png" alt="Project Showcase" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <h4>[Project] Showcase</h4>
              <p>Research • Observable JS</p>
            </div>
            <a href="[https://your-live-link.com](https://your-live-link.com)" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="hero-carousel-card">
          <div class="carousel-preview">
            <div class="mini-browser-bar">
              <span class="dot red"></span><span class="dot yellow"></span><span class="dot green"></span>
            </div>
            <div class="preview-image-container">
              <img src="images/project-3.png" alt="Agency Website" class="carousel-screenshot">
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="carousel-info">
            <div class="carousel-info-text">
              <h4>[Agency] Website</h4>
              <p>Business • Next.js</p>
            </div>
            <a href="[https://your-live-link.com](https://your-live-link.com)" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="carousel-live-btn">Live Site ↗</a>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div>

      <div class="carousel-controls">
        <button onclick="scrollHeroCarousel(-1)" class="carousel-btn" aria-label="Previous"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-left"></i></button>
        <button onclick="scrollHeroCarousel(1)" class="carousel-btn" aria-label="Next"><i class="fa-solid fa-chevron-right"></i></button>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <script>
    function scrollHeroCarousel(direction) {
      const carousel = document.getElementById('heroCarousel');
      if (!carousel) return;
      const scrollAmount = carousel.clientWidth;
      carousel.scrollBy({ left: direction * scrollAmount, behavior: 'smooth' });
    }

    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
      const carousel = document.getElementById('heroCarousel');
      if (!carousel) return;
      
      setInterval(() => {
        if (carousel.scrollLeft + carousel.clientWidth >= carousel.scrollWidth - 10) {
          carousel.scrollTo({ left: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
        } else {
          scrollHeroCarousel(1);
        }
      }, 4000); 
    });
  </script>

</div>

<section id="services" class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">What I Build</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">Two Website Types, One Standard of Quality</h2>
  <p>
    Whether you are an academic building an online identity, a researcher showcasing 
    a project, or a business seeking new clients — every site gets the same 
    deliberate craft and clean, maintainable code.
  </p>
  <div class="section-divider"></div>

  <div class="tier-grid">

    <div class="tier-card featured">
      <div class="featured-badge">Most Requested</div>
      <div class="tier-top">
        <div class="tier-icon">👨‍💻</div>
        <div class="tier-name">Academic &amp; Portfolio</div>
        <div class="tier-tagline">For researchers, developers &amp; project grants</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tier-body">
        <p class="tier-desc">
          Your first impression online should be as sharp as your CV. 
          I build sleek, fast portfolio and project sites that put your publications, 
          grants, and credentials front and centre.
        </p>
        <ul class="tier-features">
          <li>Publications, CV &amp; project showcase</li>
          <li>Interactive data &amp; tool integration</li>
          <li>Free hosting via GitHub Pages (Zero ongoing server costs)</li>
          <li>Built with Quality</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/contact.qmd" class="tier-cta">Get Your Site →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tier-card">
      <div class="tier-top">
        <div class="tier-icon">🏢</div>
        <div class="tier-name">Business Website</div>
        <div class="tier-tagline">For service providers &amp; local businesses</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tier-body">
        <p class="tier-desc">
          A clean, conversion-focused site that turns visitors into 
          enquiries. From bespoke landing pages to full multi-page builds 
          for agencies, travel firms, and consultancies.
        </p>
        <ul class="tier-features">
          <li>Lead-capture &amp; contact form setup</li>
          <li>SEO foundations &amp; meta structure</li>
          <li>Google Analytics integration</li>
          <li>Speed &amp; Core Web Vitals optimised</li>
        </ul>
        <a href="/contact.qmd" class="tier-cta">Build My Business Site →</a>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</section>

<section class="compare-section content-section">
  <div class="section-label">At a Glance</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">What's Included in Each Tier</h2>
  

  <div style="overflow-x: auto; margin-top: 2.5rem; padding-bottom: 1rem;">
    <table class="compare-table">
      <thead>
        <tr>
          <th>Feature</th>
          <th class="col-highlight">Academic &amp; Portfolio</th>
          <th>Business Site</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr>
          <td>Mobile-responsive design</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Free Hosting (No Monthly Server Cost)</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="dash">—</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Custom domain setup</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>SEO &amp; metadata</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Interactive data / demos</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="dash">—</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Contact form integration</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="dash">—</span> (Via email link)</td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Analytics dashboard</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="dash">—</span></td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
        <tr>
          <td>Post-handoff support (2 wks)</td>
          <td class="col-highlight"><span class="check">✓</span></td>
          <td><span class="check">✓</span></td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>

<div class="wd-cta content-section">
  <h2>Let's Build Something Worth Visiting</h2>
  <p>
    Every project starts with a discovery call — no commitment, 
    no pressure. Just a clear conversation about what you need and whether 
    I'm the right person to build it.
  </p>
  <div class="wd-cta-actions">
    <a href="/contact.qmd" class="btn-primary-wd">Start a Web Project →</a>
    <a href="/services/assistance.qmd" class="btn-ghost-wd">See Remote Assistance</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
